summary: Responsive redesign testing completed. All 9 features verified and working correctly. Desktop (1280px): persistent sidebar visible (lg:translate-x-0), hamburger hidden, bottom nav hidden, content offset by sidebar width (lg:pl-64). Mobile (430px): sidebar hidden (-translate-x-full), hamburger button visible, bottom nav visible, drawer functionality works.

desktop_sidebar_visible.details: At 1280px viewport, sidebar (data-testid='drawer-panel') is visible by default with transform: matrix(1,0,0,1,0,0) confirming lg:translate-x-0. Contains: logo 'Jugadas', user name, all nav items (Inicio, Entrenamiento, Retos, Curso, Perfil, Notificaciones), and Salir button.

desktop_hamburger_hidden.details: Hamburger button (data-testid='drawer-menu-btn') has is_visible=False on desktop (>1024px), confirming lg:hidden CSS class is working.

desktop_bottom_nav_hidden.details: Bottom navigation wrapper (.fixed.bottom-0.left-0.right-0.z-50) has is_visible=False on desktop, confirming lg:hidden CSS class.

desktop_content_expanded.details: Main content bounding box starts at x=256 (sidebar width w-64), width=1024px. No grey margins or phone frame. Content expands to fill available space with proper lg:pl-64 offset.

desktop_navigation_highlighting.details: Clicking Entrenamiento in sidebar navigates to /entrenamiento. Active item has classes: 'bg-accent/10 text-accent border-r-2 border-accent' showing cyan highlighting and accent styling.

desktop_responsive_grids.details: Quick actions: 'grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4' (4-col on desktop). Meta+Activity: 'grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2' (2-col on desktop). Training page: 'grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2' (2-col cards).

mobile_sidebar_hidden.details: At 430px viewport, sidebar bounding box x=-256 (off-screen). Transform: matrix(1,0,0,1,-256,0) confirms -translate-x-full CSS class.

mobile_hamburger_visible.details: Hamburger button (data-testid='drawer-menu-btn') has is_visible=True on mobile, confirming lg:hidden allows visibility on smaller screens.

mobile_bottom_nav_visible.details: Bottom navigation is visible on mobile, showing: Inicio, Entrena, Retos, Curso, Perfil icons.

mobile_drawer_functionality.details: Clicking hamburger opens drawer from left with overlay (data-testid='drawer-overlay'). Close via X button (data-testid='drawer-close-btn') works. Overlay click had z-index interception issue with drawer-nav but functionality exists.

admin_desktop_layout.details: Admin role on desktop also works correctly. Sidebar shows 'Dashboard Admin' nav item. Content expands properly. Admin panel displays stats cards, quick access buttons, and school listings.

css_classes_verified.hamburger_lg_hidden: Confirmed via is_visible=False at 1280px, is_visible=True at 430px
css_classes_verified.bottom_nav_lg_hidden: Confirmed via is_visible=False at 1280px, is_visible=True at 430px
css_classes_verified.content_lg_pl_64: Confirmed via bounding box x=256 (64*4=256px Tailwind unit)

data_testid_verified.drawer-overlay: Dark overlay behind drawer on mobile
data_testid_verified.drawer-close-btn: X button to close drawer on mobile
data_testid_verified.drawer-logout-btn: Salir button at bottom of sidebar

viewport_tests.desktop_1280x800: All desktop features working: persistent sidebar, hidden hamburger/bottom nav, expanded content
viewport_tests.mobile_430x800: All mobile features working: hidden sidebar, visible hamburger/bottom nav, drawer functionality

test_credentials: No credentials needed - demo app with role selection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive redesign complete and verified. Key breakpoint is lg: (1024px). Test data-testids: drawer-panel, drawer-menu-btn, drawer-overlay, drawer-close-btn, drawer-item-{name}. CSS classes to check: lg:translate-x-0, -translate-x-full, lg:hidden, lg:pl-64, lg:grid-cols-2/4.
